sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45394" key="eu)fantasi/wtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐφαντ-ᾰσίωτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45394.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gifted with a vivid imagination</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:47:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.2.30</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρᾶξις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).209</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; also in bad sense, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fantastic, fanciful</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:150:12" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">150.12</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
